generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded actuator within Building Control Systems (BCS) that executes user-centered control strategies like adaptive lighting policies, configured via middleware integration with Eclipse Hono/Ditto for dynamic adjustment of building systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC) based on virtual-to-physical interactions."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System component responsible for managing HVAC systems with bidirectional communication endpoints defined in BIM model, enabling real-time control signals for occupancy-based temperature and airflow adjustments."
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator system integrated with BOREALIS adaptive lighting policies, configured through Ditto device management for real-time energy optimization based on occupancy sensor data."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor deployed across building infrastructure capturing real-time occupancy data, annotated in BIM model with metadata (location, data format) for automated extraction during model-driven deployment pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring real-time temperature conditions, integrated with Eclipse Hono for secure data ingestion and standardized normalization for DT synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy monitoring sensor capturing real-time consumption patterns, used for BOREALIS energy optimization analytics and life-cycle performance forecasting."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancyFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor collecting user experience data for post-occupancy analysis, feeding reinforcement learning models (e.g., BOREALIS) to refine control policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData FeedbackDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance FeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancyFeedbackSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric, spatial, and functional representation of building components (walls, HVAC systems) serving as foundational digital representation for model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToRuntimeTransformer
]

instance RuntimeSemanticsLayer : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extensions to BIM model containing device metadata (sensor IDs, control logic) and middleware configurations (Hono/Ditto endpoints) for runtime artifact generation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDeviceManager
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation outputs generating runtime artifacts (control policies, visualization scripts) for Unreal Engine 5 simulations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualizer
]

instance OperationalDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor telemetry repository storing temperature, occupancy, and energy consumption data ingested via Eclipse Hono and managed by Ditto's device management system."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance CustomServiceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extensible dataset for AI-driven analytics and predictive maintenance integrated via modular plugins, supporting parallel deployment of custom DT functionalities."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningAdapter
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMToRuntimeTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool automating BIM-to-DT transformations using model-to-model and model-to-text techniques to generate runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseHonoIngestor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Secure, scalable IoT data ingestion middleware providing device management and real-time synchronization between physical sensors and virtual twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance DittoDeviceManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication platform enabling MQTT/HTTP-based interactions between DT and physical systems for device management and telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlPolicyExecutor, ServiceIntegrationPlatform
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization engine providing real-time building performance monitoring and interactive control interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveControlService, VisualizationInterface
]

instance ReinforcementLearningAdapter : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework integrating custom AI models (e.g., BOREALIS) for continuous adaptation of control policies based on post-occupancy feedback."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

instance ODTEValidator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement metric evaluator assessing synchronization fidelity between physical twin and digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous visualization of building performance metrics (energy consumption, occupancy) through Unreal Engine 5 interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service using sensor data to optimize control policies (e.g., energy-efficient lighting in BOREALIS) through model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertAction, PolicyOptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationAndOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation service generating runtime artifacts for life-cycle analysis and performance forecasting."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceForecastingInsight, CostModelingInsight
]

instance InteractiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facility management interface allowing real-time adjustments to building systems (lighting, HVAC) with immediate virtual-physical synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACAdjustmentAction, LightingControlAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationPlatform : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling DT engineers to develop plug-and-play services like AI-driven analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides AIAnalyticsInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceAction
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for secure data ingestion and normalization of sensor data from physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataNormalizationInsight
]

instance PhysicalToVirtualBridge : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional communication between physical sensors and virtual twin components."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationInsight
]

instance ControlPolicyExecutor : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing control policies generated by the DT based on real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyExecutionInsight
]

instance ServiceIntegrationPlatform : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Platform enabling integration of various DT services and components."
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegrationInsight
]

instance VisualizationInterface : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive visualization capabilities for building performance monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing adaptive control strategies based on reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlInsight
]

instance PolicyRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously refining control policies based on post-occupancy feedback."
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyRefinementInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated validation checks assessing synchronization fidelity between physical twin and digital twin using ODTE metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationFidelityInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time analytics on consumption patterns enabling BOREALIS adaptive lighting policies for energy efficiency."
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustments to HVAC/lighting based on post-occupancy data for optimized building performance."
]

instance MaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "AI-driven alerts for equipment failures based on sensor telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PolicyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous refinement of control policies through reinforcement learning using post-occupancy feedback."
]

instance PerformanceForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Life-cycle simulations for cost modeling and refurbishment planning based on operational data."
]

instance CostModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Financial impact analysis of building operations derived from energy consumption patterns."
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Facility manager-initiated HVAC system adjustments reflected in real-time across both physical and virtual systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic lighting control implementation through DT interface with immediate physical system synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AIAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Custom AI model outputs providing advanced predictive analytics for building optimization."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Proactive maintenance scheduling based on sensor degradation patterns detected by custom service plugins."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SynchronizationFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative assessment of Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance DataNormalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Standardized normalization of sensor data for compatibility with DT runtime artifacts."
]

instance SynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of synchronization status between physical and virtual components."
]

instance PolicyExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of control policy execution in real-time systems."
]

instance IntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of service integration quality within the DT ecosystem."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation of visualization quality and user interface effectiveness."
]

instance AdaptiveControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of adaptive control strategy effectiveness."
]

instance PolicyRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of policy refinement process based on feedback data."
]

// C12: Environment/Component
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain system under study encompassing operational control systems (lighting, HVAC) with life-cycle management capabilities."
    base:contains BuildingControlEnvironmentComponent, VisualizationComponent
]

instance BuildingControlEnvironmentComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular building control component integrating sensors, actuators, and middleware for adaptive system management."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5-based interface enabling immersive monitoring and stakeholder collaboration."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is enabled through **runtime control logic** generated from the BIM model, which defines **actuation commands** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) sent back to the physical system. The framework uses **Eclipse Ditto** to manage device telemetry and **Unreal Engine 5** for **interactive visualization**, where facility managers can issue commands via the DT interface. These commands are translated into **standardized control signals** (e.g., MQTT protocols) and executed by the building’s BCS. The system supports **user-centered control strategies** (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) and **reinforcement learning-based optimization** (as in **BOREALIS**), ensuring dynamic adjustments to the physical infrastructure."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and event-driven**, with synchronization occurring at **millisecond to second intervals** for critical operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control signals). The framework supports:
   - **Continuous synchronization** for **low-latency interactions** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC responses).
   - **Periodic updates** for **longer-term analytics** (e.g., energy consumption trends over hours/days).
   - **Event-based triggers** (e.g., occupancy detection, alarm notifications) for **immediate DT responses**.
   The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **fidelity of synchronization** between the PT and DT over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Backbone**: Central repository for **static and runtime semantics**, serving as the **semantic foundation**.
   - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** handles **data ingestion, device telemetry, and control signal routing**.
   - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides **interactive 3D interfaces** for facility managers.
   - **Service Layer**: **Modular plugins** (e.g., analytics, optimization) extend DT functionality via **standardized APIs**.
   - **Control Logic Layer**: **Reinforcement learning policies** (e.g., **BOREALIS**) and **user-defined strategies** are embedded in the DT for **dynamic adaptation**.
   The constellation supports **bidirectional data flows** (PT → DT → PT) and **horizontal integration** with external systems (e.g., facility management platforms)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **three primary life-cycle stages**:
   1. **Design Phase**: BIM models are enriched with **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) to prepare for deployment.
   2. **Construction Phase**: The DT is **provisioned and validated** using **model-driven automation**, with **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** configured for real-time data exchange.
   3. **Operation Phase**: The DT enables **continuous monitoring, optimization, and control** of the building’s infrastructure, with **reinforcement learning** (e.g., **BOREALIS**) refining control policies over time.
   The DT represents the **as-operated state** of the physical twin, with **post-occupancy data** used to **adapt and evolve** the virtual representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantifies **synchronization accuracy** between PT and DT by comparing **real-time sensor data** with **virtual representations**.
   - **Model Validation**: **Automated checks** (e.g., semantic consistency, data normalization) during the **BIM-to-DT transformation**.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: **Post-occupancy data** (e.g., sensor drift, environmental noise) is used to **adjust control policies** dynamically.
   - **Verification Protocols**: **Reinforcement learning validation** (e.g., **BOREALIS**) ensures **predictive accuracy** of optimization models.
   The framework addresses **semantic drift** by **closing feedback loops** between PT and DT via **real-time data synchronization**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for **secure IoT data ingestion** and **Eclipse Ditto** for **device management and telemetry**, using:
   - **MQTT/HTTP Protocols**: For **low-latency bidirectional communication** between PT and DT.
   - **Tenant/Device IDs**: Standardized **metadata identifiers** (e.g., tenant ID, device ID) extracted from BIM models.
   - **Endpoint Addresses**: **Middleware-specific endpoints** (e.g., Hono/Ditto gateways) for **real-time data routing**.
   The connection architecture supports **scalability** (e.g., campus-wide deployments) and **interoperability** with **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **cloud-native, modular architecture** with:
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**: Deployed as **containerized microservices** for **scalable IoT data processing**.
   - **Unreal Engine 5**: Runs on **high-performance rendering servers** for **interactive 3D visualization**.
   - **Custom Service Plugins**: Hosted in a **sandboxed environment** to ensure **isolation and security**.
   Deployment follows a **model-driven automation pipeline**, reducing manual intervention. The framework supports **on-premise or cloud-based hosting**, with **low-latency requirements** for real-time applications (e.g., lighting control)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports horizontal integration with:
   - **External Facility Management Systems**: **Standardized APIs** (e.g., RESTful endpoints) for **data exchange** with third-party platforms.
   - **IoT Platforms**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto compatibility** ensures **seamless connectivity** with **industrial IoT ecosystems**.
   - **BIM Collaboration Tools**: **Interoperability** with **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) for **cross-domain data sharing**.
   - **Custom Service Ecosystems**: **Modular plugins** allow integration with **AI/ML tools**, **predictive analytics**, or **blockchain-based audit logs** for **transparency**."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed as follows:
   - **PT Owner Retains Control**: The **physical twin’s owner** retains **primary ownership** of operational data (e.g., sensor readings).
   - **DT Service Provider Access**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** acts as a **neutral middleware**, ensuring **secure data routing** without altering ownership.
   - **Privacy Measures**: **Encrypted communication** (e.g., TLS) and **role-based access control** (e.g., tenant-specific permissions) protect sensitive data.
   - **Compliance**: Adherence to **AECO-specific regulations** (e.g., GDPR for personal data) and **industrial standards** (e.g., ISO/IEC 42010 for cybersecurity)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** and **Construction Operations Building Information Exchange (COBie)** for **semantic interoperability**.
   - **IoT Protocols**: **MQTT v3.1.1** and **HTTP/REST** for **real-time data exchange**.
   - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Ditto** (OASIS IoT standard) and **Eclipse Hono** (OMA LWM2M-compliant) for **device management**.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering**: **MOF/MDA** (Meta Object Facility/Model-Driven Architecture) for **automated transformations**.
   - **Visualization**: **Unreal Engine 5** with **OpenGL/Vulkan** for **cross-platform compatibility**.
   The framework ensures **backward compatibility** with **existing AECO tools** and **future extensibility** via **standardized extension points**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Encrypted Communication**: **TLS 1.3** for **secure data transmission** between PT and DT.
   - **Authentication**: **OAuth 2.0/JWT** for **role-based access control** in the DT interface.
   - **Isolation**: **Containerized microservices** (e.g., Hono/Ditto) prevent **cross-service vulnerabilities**.
   - **Safety Protocols**: **Fail-safe mechanisms** in control logic (e.g., **emergency shutdowns** for HVAC systems) to prevent **human accidents**.
   - **Cybersecurity Audits**: **Regular validation** of **middleware configurations** (e.g., Ditto device permissions) to mitigate **remote exploitation risks**.
   The framework follows **ISO/IEC 42010** for **cyber-physical system safety** and **NIST SP 800-53** for **data protection standards**."
]
